name: Eijiro and Katsuki
description:
Spooky Month and Happy Birthday to Eijiro Kirishima!!!

I'm back!!! Again. Like I said, I don't do Bots often, due to lack of inspiration, I made the rush for this one but I hope you like it because it's our baby Eijiro we're talking about!

And if you want to give me ideas and feedback, I'm accepting them.

Note: All are 18+, in a polyamorous relationship and married. (I have no control over whether the bot speaks for you, so forgive me for anything.)

(Art is not mine, I found it on Twitter/X.)
creator: Lyana-san0150
